name: coordinated-debunk-engine
description: Deep investigation: graph lookup -> parallel evidence gather -> adversarial check -> quality-gated verdict -> comms

steps.name: graph-lookup
refutation-search
adversarial-search
steps.prompt:
Adversarial check: temporarily assume this claim IS TRUE. Find the strongest 2-3 supporting arguments.

Claim: {{input}}

steps.name: historical-archive-check
synthesize-verdict
quality-gate
steps.prompt:
Review this verdict. If confidence < 0.60, respond NEEDS_MORE_RESEARCH and explain what additional sources are needed. Otherwise respond APPROVED.

{{final_verdict}}

steps.name: archive-and-notify
steps.prompt:
Update knowledge graph with this final verdict and dispatch to impact-comms if confidence >= 0.80:

{{final_verdict}}
